title: Icon to indicate existence & status of dependencies
excerpt:

posts.author: Roberta (Roberta)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please create icons at the start of the name of the Item to indicate (1) that a dependency exists related to that Item and (2) the status of the dependency. It’s hard when scanning a board to know if there are dependencies that need to be completed first or if an Item is the start of of other dependencies. Asana does this well.

What are you trying to achieve

Easy way to visualize which tasks have dependencies that are blocking an Item from starting or if an Item might be the block to other others getting started.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 this would be really helpful.

Right now dependencies are there, but not very visible when you’re scanning a board. You have to click into items or rely on timeline views to understand what’s blocked vs blocking others.

An icon or visual indicator at the item level would make it much easier to:

  • quickly spot blocked items

  • identify what’s holding other work up

  • understand flow without digging into each item

Especially for larger boards, this would save a lot of time and make dependencies actually usable day to day, not just something you set once and forget.
